headline: PR Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Strong Output, Revenues Miss
summary: PR expects 2026 net oil production of 190,000-195,000 Bbls/d and total net production of 400,000-430,000 Boe/d.

headline: Reconnaissance Energy Africa expects Kavango West 1X production testing to begin by month-end
summary: Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd (TSX-V:RECO, OTCQX:RECAF, FRA:0XD) announced that operations in Namibia are advancing toward the start of production testing at the Kavango West 1X well, with testing expected to begin before the end of May. headline: ReconAfrica Progresses Toward Kavango West 1X Production Test
summary: CALGARY, Alberta, May 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd. (the “Company”, “ReconAfrica”) (TSXV: RECO) (OTCQX: RECAF) (Frankfurt: 0XD) (NSX: REC) is pleased to announce that operations in Namibia continue to progress. ReconAfrica (operator), along with partners NAMCOR and BW Energy, have progressed downhole testing operations at Kavango West 1X (“KW1X”). Equipment and services have been arriving on site, which have been procured from both Namibian and international comp

headline: Does Cost-Driven Beat And VoltaGrid Deal Reshape Halliburton’s New Energy Story (HAL)?
summary: Halliburton reported past first-quarter 2026 adjusted earnings of US$0.55 per share, surpassing analyst estimates on the back of cost-cutting, while also maintaining a cash position of about US$2.00 billion and keeping capital expenditure at US$192 million. At the same time, Halliburton’s participation in a US$1.00 billion equity investment in VoltaGrid highlights how the company is aligning with behind-the-meter power solutions for data centers and industrial users. We’ll now examine how...

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Halliburton (HAL) After Its 101% One-Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Halliburton at around US$41.70 still offers value after a strong run, the key is understanding what the current price actually reflects. The stock has returned 10.9% over the past month, 40.9% year to date, and 101.0% over the last year, which naturally raises questions about how much of the story is already priced in. Recent coverage has focused on Halliburton as a major US energy services company and how its scale and global footprint position it within the...
